title: Duck Mod
description: This mod adds ducks for Minecraft 1.21.10+
body:
# Duck Mod
This mod adds some extra life into your world by introducing the duck mob from Minecraft: Dungeons, complete with duck sounds, duck-related items, and a duck spawn egg.  
Includes variants in 26.1.

**Features new items:**
- Duck Spawn Egg
- Raw Duck
- Cooked Duck
- White Egg (+2 variants)

A "Programmer Art" texture pack comes built-in from 26.1 onwards, but older versions are available [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/duckmodart).

**About variants**  
Due to how the mod is made, summoning a duck variant requires a slightly different command:  
`/summon duckmod:duck ~ ~ ~ {variant:"duckmod:warm"}`  
`/summon duckmod:duck ~ ~ ~ {variant:"duckmod:cold"}`  

An example Datapack and Resourcepack for adding duck variants can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/duckmodextras).
 
## Notes
This is **not** a chicken retexture. This mod does not replace or alter chickens. Ducks will spawn and coexist alongside them.

### Bugs and Issues
If any bugs are encountered, please report them directly to me on Discord at 'watchernovius'. 
Suggestions, improvements, and bugfixes are welcome.

### Want to Contribute?
Help with translating the mod [here](https://github.com/guyanon0265/duckmodtranslation/tree/main) by requesting or contributing translations. Translations can also be requested or sent directly to me on Discord. Requesting allows me to prioritize translations out of the 130+ languages Minecraft supports.
